chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Bilal

text: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن بلال فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن عليّ بن بلال‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Bilal has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Ali ibn Bilal.
